justification: All 4 bracket boundaries correct: 9999→0%, 10000→10% (AC2), 50000→10% (AC4), 150000→25% (AC7). AC8 validation present with 3 negative/zero tests. All 9 boundary values explicitly tested (9999, 10000, 10001, 49999 implicit via 50000 inclusive, 50000, 50001, 149999 implicit via 150000 inclusive, 150000, 150001). acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 8 ACs with status and test references.

observations.text: Correct inclusive/exclusive boundary logic: income < 10000 (exclusive), income <= 50000 (inclusive), income <= 150000 (inclusive)
AC4 boundary at 50000 correctly returns 10% not 25% — the most common off-by-one failure mode avoided
AC7 boundary at 150000 correctly returns 25% not 40%
AC8 covers zero, negative, and large negative values
15 tests with explicit boundary values at every bracket edge, not just mid-bracket samples
49999 and 149999 not explicitly listed as individual test cases — coverage relies on the inclusive boundary tests being correct rather than testing both sides of each split independently
